examples: The government recognized there were problems in urban areas but these could never be an excuse for lawless behaviour.
It is lawless right now in the Wild West.
Battlefields, though, were not lawless places before this.
DiFava replaces Joseph Lawless, who was reassigned to oversee security at the Port of Boston.
Ken McKenna has recruited well in John Lawless and in all likelihood Lee Spike from Aberystwyth.
